item.title: Active addiction vs 9 yrs in recovery!!
item.description:
Rock bottom April 3rd 2014
April 2022 Recovery is possible and every single person struggling out there deserves it and can achieve it ❤ Edit: Its hard for me to reply to everyone when I only have 140 characters. Heroin (fentanyl) was my drug of choice. Addiction runs heavy and deep on both sides of my family. My dad died of an overdose in 08. It hit me extremely hard. Thank God he died before I got strung out. Ill never stop thanking God for that. I got detained once in 13 and then full blown arrested in the first part of 14. The DA thankfully recommended treatment court at sentencing. I completed it in 2019. My county has an excellent program and our POs also are real hard asses. I needed that rigid structure at that time. It helped me maintain accountability. It also re taught me the life skills I was lacking. Not even a traffic violation after that lol What would I tell my former self: Theres not a damned thing I could tell myself during that time. Treatment court saved my life. No doubt abt it. At that point, death would have been a blessing to me. I kept my addiction hidden from public as long as I could. I was tired. Ready for change I couldnt bring abt on my own. I dont regret anything except the pain I caused my loved ones and my contribution to the overall shittiness of my community. I love and value myself 100% more now than I did before I even tried heroin. Heroin was never the problem. The problem was my lack of self;esteem and self worth. I wasted so much time making the mistakes it took to finally meet and love my real self. Thanks for all the love and support! No thanks to the ppl calling me ugly names. Ive seriously read some of the mean ones to my grandmother (who came to every single treatment court meeting with me) and were all laughing abt them Edit again: Thank you even more for all the positivity! To everyone in new sobriety, old sobriety, current addiction: You guys are in my thoughts tonight! Be gentle to yourselves and honestly take your time. With everything. If you dont arent there yet, youll grow with time and never forget how to appreciate even the littlest of things. To this day, I appreciate goosebumps that happen to me because the weather is actually cold not based on my withdrawal symptoms. I still focus on time hour by hour every now and then. Its a tool that actually works even though youve heard it preached a thousand times. You grow into it though. I did anyway. AA/NA and other step programs: I attended the meetings that were required of me. I learned something new each meeting. I researched the programs and gave them the respect they deserve. They werent for me but the lessons taught I retained and needed the non judgemental environment. I don't want to discourage anyone. Try and experience every time of step meeting you can attend at least once. Theyre def worth a try. 700 edits later: thats not a rifle in my backseat. Its a stupid old plastic nra lighter. I dont think it even works. Its good juju. Also, an ACTUAL AR-15 would take up my backseat. Please note the size in the photo.

item.title: The 101st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 4 - Misc Sound dotGifs
item.description:
First off are some Interweb Classics for ya!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Sorry, I don't have part 4
If anyone has the one that doesn't cut off where this one does, PLEASE link in the comments
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01GVol Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. III Vol 61 https://imgur.com/gallery/VNlNlNX - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. IV Vol 62 https://imgur.com/gallery/5BAeeTJ - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. V Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. item.title: Men Are Victims Too
item.description: A domestic survivor is finally taking her abuser to court. This poor woman had a cigarette put out on her face, a finger cut off, slaps and punches were part of her normal day, the man defecated in her bed while his friends laughed. There are audio and pictures to back all of this up. There were doctors that witnessed some of the abuse. The man put makeup on to imitate bruises for pictures and court appearances, but the next day there were no bruises to be seen￼. The man tried so so so hard to ruin this woman’s life. The media didn’t even ask her side. They blamed her drinking as the problem (she had been sober for YEARS but the violent relationship had led her back to her addiction, her only escape) the man leaked a picture of her asleep with ice cream melted on her to prove how “out of control” she was. To shame her even more. All of her past partners have stepped up to support her, all saying she was nothing but kind and loving. How can we treat domestic abuse survivors this way?? This woman isn’t a woman, she’s Johnny Depp, and the man is Amber Heard. For some reason his abuse wasn’t taken serious, it was mocked. If he were a woman would it have been so openly mocked? Abuse is Abuse. We need to protect victims regardless of gender. #JusticeForJohnnyDepp #AmberHeardIsAnAbuser

item.title: I say this as someone with two degrees (almost three)
item.description: I’m a math teacher. Someone in a comment asked where factorials were used and, I mentioned that they’re used in probability, and not much else (which is true). I also said that I’m in the middle of teaching my students about factorials, despite knowing most of them will never see it again (which is also true). You’d think I’d said that my students were all stupid and would never go anywhere in life, for how people read it. One person said I was dismissing both math and my students. Bizarre, given that I took 13 math classes after algebra 2 — which is what I take — for fun. I got two degrees so I could share my love of it with my students. Some of those students will be making more money than me in 5 years. And they’ll never see a factorial again. In fact, I’ll be so bold as to say that they’ll never take a math class again. AND THAT’S OKAY. The school where I work supports four postsecondary routes: college, trade school, workforce, and military. They all need to apply to the local community college, but it’s their choice to go. I’ve got kids going to school next year to be general contractors, mechanics, welders, roofers, and more. I’ve got a few who are already in apprentice programs. I’ve also got kids who are going to be going to work full time so they can help support their families. Some have kids of their own to support, some want to move out, and some have lost parents and siblings and need to pick up the slack. In none of these cases am I dismissing my students. They are, on the whole, wonderful, capable kids who will go on to contribute to society in one way or another. They are making smart financial decisions by avoiding student debt. They are getting jobs that can pay big bucks and developing useful skills and experience. Hell, I know a guy who dropped out at 14 and makes six figures driving a truck. Acknowledging what my students are doing with their futures is, in fact, the exact opposite of dismissing them. I’m currently working on getting them to be able to graduate early. I’ve already told one student from last year that I would commission a tattoo from them, and I have a student this year whose name I’m keeping in mind for when I buy a house and need to remodel. A girl in my first period is going to let me know where she ends up working as a mechanic. Another kid from last year is hustling to be a musician, working to buy studio time. They don’t need to go to college. They do t need more math class. They’ll be okay. Anecdotally, college also just isn’t for everyone. I went through severe trauma at 19 and had to take time off. I went back for a bit, and then ended up trying to off myself right before graduation because of the stress (it was partly a bad reaction to my medication, but the stress caused the breakdown). I’m taking this semester and next semester off from a masters program because trying to fight my ADHD and PTSD while also teaching and going to school was literally killing me. It wasn’t sustainable. I was getting three hours of sleep per night. Anyways, that’s my two cents. Agree, disagree, whatever.
item.dc:creator: ptothedubs

item.title: PSA: F— Elon Musk.
item.description: Someone with his status and wealth could accomplish so much, and yet he consistently chooses to be a petty man baby. And yeah, yeah - to everyone in the comments: I know it wasn’t to “end” world hunger for good. I’m not here to split hairs, I’m just here to point out one of the many monumental D-bags in the world. “To Safeguard Free Speech, We Must Hand Control of a Major Speech Platform to One Guy”: https://www.esquire.com/news-politics/a39813165/elon-musk-buy-twitter-censorship-democracy/ Oh yeah, this guy also wants to un-ban Trump in the name of freedom of speech. Give me a f—king break.

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #20
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) ***EDIT - Wow, I posted this and went to sleep, and am now waking up to most viral and many comments and some donations! Woo-hoo! Thank you guys so much, every dollar donated makes a difference! Seriously, even a $2.50 donation makes a difference because it means he can buy a gallon of milk, or two boxes of Mac and cheese, etc. thank you guys, so much ❤️ I’ll be digging into the individual comments on my lunch break. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX 15 - https://imgur.com/gallery/59sfisF 16 - https://imgur.com/gallery/uvZueER 17 - https://imgur.com/gallery/Dmi0hX3 18 - https://imgur.com/gallery/5qbONFr 19 - https://imgur.com/gallery/yQAj164
